findings.location: s4 — Formクラス Java code example
findings.description: The Java code sample omits import statements, which provide the fully qualified package paths for the @UserId and @CurrentDateTime annotations: `nablarch.core.db.statement.autoproperty.UserId` and `nablarch.core.db.statement.autoproperty.CurrentDateTime`. These package paths are useful for developers to know which package to import these annotations from.
